assessment.note: He named a concrete next-level aspiration — owning a cross-org decision area — which signals strong growth direction and some continued investment.

new_queue.label: Cross-org decisions
new_queue.name: Cross-org decision area — which decisions do you want to own?
new_queue.description: Turns his stated aspiration into a concrete target area of ownership.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Air cover needed
new_queue.name: What kind of air cover would let you take a more visible position?
new_queue.description: Explores the manager support needed to step into more public strategic ownership.

new_queue.label: First commitment
new_queue.name: What is the one growth move you want to make before we meet again?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete commitment without introducing a new thread.
